generated_for: Stock Market AI Strategy Builder (OpenBB + Claude + Render + GitHub)
description: Distinct trading strategies. Each strategy separates a FUNDAMENTAL block from a TECHNICAL block, then defines entry, stop, target, risk, regime fit, and score-fusion weights so the agent pipeline and backtester can consume it directly.

conventions.all_numeric_thresholds: Default values only - tune per market/instrument during backtest. Never hard-code as truth.
conventions.ATR: Average True Range on the signal timeframe unless noted.
conventions.RVOL: Relative volume vs the same-time-of-day average over a trailing window (default 20 days).
conventions.R: 1R = the distance from entry to stop = the dollar risk on the trade.
conventions.VWAP: Session-anchored volume weighted average price (intraday) or earnings-anchored VWAP where noted.
conventions.score_0_100: Each agent emits 0-100; the Strategy Builder fuses them with the per-strategy weights below.

global_risk_model.pdt_rule_note: US margin day trading under $25k equity is capped at 3 day-trades / 5 business days. The risk agent must enforce this before any intraday signal is sent live.

score_fusion.rule: Trade only when (a) total fused score >= threshold AND (b) the strategy's required_gates all pass AND (c) risk agent approves. Any single hard-gate failure = no_trade regardless of score.

strategies.name: Opening Range Breakout (ORB)
strategies.holding_period: minutes to hours, flat by close

fundamental_block.purpose: Make sure the mover is liquid, catalyst-backed, and free of landmines.

filters.earnings_within_session: avoid unless explicitly trading the catalyst
filters.float_note: small-cap momentum: prefer float < 50M for sharper moves; large-cap: prioritize liquidity over float

technical_block.entry_trigger: 1m close above opening-range high (long) with volume expansion
technical_block.stop_logic: below opening-range low or below VWAP, ~1.0 x ATR(14,1m)
technical_block.target_logic: scale 1R and 2R; trail remainder under EMA9 / VWAP; hard time-stop at session close

strategies.name: VWAP Trend Pullback (intraday continuation)
strategies.holding_period: minutes to hours, flat by close

fundamental_block.purpose: Trade continuation only in liquid names inside a supportive sector.

technical_block.trend_definition: price above rising VWAP; EMA9 > EMA20 > EMA50 on 1m; higher-highs / higher-lows
technical_block.pullback_zone: VWAP, EMA20, or prior breakout level
required_conditions: bullish reversal candle at support (hammer / bullish engulfing)
volume picks up on the bounce
technical_block.entry_trigger: break of the pullback candle high in trend direction
technical_block.stop_logic: below pullback swing low / below VWAP, ~1.0 x ATR(14,1m)
technical_block.target_logic: prior intraday high, then trail; ~2R typical

fundamental_block.purpose: Counter-trend mean reversion - avoid names with a fresh one-way catalyst.

filters.fresh_hard_catalyst: avoid (a strong catalyst keeps trending against the fade)

technical_block.liquidity_pools: equal highs/lows, prior-day high/low, session high/low
sequence: liquidity sweep: price spikes through the level then rejects (stop hunt)
Change of Character (CHoCH): break of the most recent minor structure in the new direction
entry zone: retrace into Fair Value Gap (FVG) or order block left by the impulse
technical_block.entry_trigger: rejection candle inside FVG/order block after CHoCH
technical_block.stop_logic: just beyond the sweep extreme (past the wick)
technical_block.target_logic: opposing liquidity pool / first FVG fill; 2-3R because stop is tight

fundamental_block.purpose: Ride a catalyst-driven mover during a controlled pause.

filters.float_note: lower float amplifies the measured move but raises slippage risk

technical_block.pattern: strong impulse leg (pole) -> tight consolidation (flag) on declining volume
required_conditions: flag slopes flat/down against the trend
technical_block.entry_trigger: break of flag high with a fresh volume surge
technical_block.target_logic: measured move = pole height projected from breakout; scale out, trail EMA9

strategies.name: Quality-Growth Momentum Swing (CAN SLIM-style base breakout)

fundamental_block.purpose: Buy fundamentally elite leaders breaking out of sound bases.

technical_block.stage: Stage 2 uptrend: price above rising 50DMA and 200DMA, 50DMA > 200DMA
required_conditions: relative-strength line at or near new high
not extended (< ~5% above pivot at entry)
technical_block.entry_trigger: breakout through base pivot on volume > 40-50% above average
technical_block.stop_logic: 7-8% below entry, or below base low (~1.5-2 x ATR daily)
technical_block.target_logic: hold the trend; trim 20-25% gains or on a high-volume break of the 50DMA / climax top

strategies.name: Value Pullback in Uptrend (quality at a discount)

fundamental_block.purpose: Buy durable, cheap-quality businesses on technical weakness with a margin of safety.

filters.margin_of_safety: price below DCF/intrinsic fair value estimate

technical_block.pullback_zone: 50DMA, prior breakout level, or 38-50% Fibonacci retrace
required_conditions: bullish reversal candle / reclaim of support
technical_block.entry_trigger: reclaim of support or confirmed reversal candle
technical_block.stop_logic: below support / below 200DMA, ~2 x ATR daily
technical_block.target_logic: prior high or fair-value estimate; trim at 1.5R, trail the rest

skip_rules: valuation cheap for a reason (broken thesis)

fundamental_block.purpose: Exploit underreaction to a genuine positive earnings surprise.

technical_block.post_print_structure: gap up holding above the pre-earnings range and above VWAP
required_conditions: volume surge on the gap day
price consolidates above the gap (gap not filled)
technical_block.entry_trigger: break of day-1 high, or first pullback that holds the gap
technical_block.stop_logic: below the gap / below day-1 low
technical_block.target_logic: ride the drift; trail under rising EMA20 or earnings-anchored VWAP

fundamental_block.purpose: Tilt capital toward sectors the macro backdrop and earnings breadth favor.

filters.macro_alignment: rates/cycle backdrop supports the sector (e.g. cyclicals risk-on, defensives risk-off)

technical_block.relative_strength: sector ETF RS line vs benchmark rising; RS rank top quartile
technical_block.trend: sector ETF above rising 50DMA; 3- and 6-month momentum positive
technical_block.rotation_signal: sector crosses up through its relative-strength moving average
technical_block.entry_trigger: buy sector ETF or top 2-3 leaders on pullback or fresh breakout
technical_block.stop_logic: sector ETF below 50DMA or RS leadership breaks down
technical_block.target_logic: hold while RS leadership persists; rotate out when it fades

fundamental_block.purpose: Fade extremes only in stable, low-event instruments.

filters.instrument_profile: index ETF or low-beta dividend-stable names with strong balance sheets

required_conditions: price tags lower Bollinger Band (20,2) at range support
technical_block.entry_trigger: reversal confirmation at support (fade the extreme)
technical_block.stop_logic: below range support (a clean break invalidates the thesis)
technical_block.target_logic: mean (20MA / Bollinger midband) or opposite band; take profit quickly ~1-1.5R

agent_mapping.Market Regime Agent: Sets best_regimes gate for every strategy; disables strategies whose regime is absent.
agent_mapping.Sector Rotation Agent: Feeds S8 directly; supplies sector_in_favor / sector strength to S1-S7.
agent_mapping.Stock Universe Agent: Applies fundamental_block liquidity/float/earnings filters to build each strategy's candidate list.
agent_mapping.Fundamental Analysis Agent: Scores fundamental_block for S5, S6, S7 (heavy) and quality checks for S1-S4 (light).
agent_mapping.Valuation Agent: Drives S6 margin-of-safety and informs S5/S7.
agent_mapping.News/Sentiment Agent: Validates catalyst_required gates (S1, S4, S7) and avoids landmines.
agent_mapping.Technical Analysis Agent: Computes all technical_block indicators deterministically (TA library, not the LLM).
agent_mapping.Smart Money Concepts Agent: Owns S3 sequence (sweep -> CHoCH -> FVG/order block).
agent_mapping.Strategy Builder Agent: Fuses agent scores with score_weights, checks required_gates, emits the rule set.
agent_mapping.Risk Manager Agent: Applies global_risk_model, sizes the position, enforces PDT + daily loss, holds final veto.
agent_mapping.Backtest Agent: Runs each strategy with realistic costs across regimes before it is allowed live.
agent_mapping.Execution Agent: Paper by default; live only after repeated out-of-sample validation.
agent_mapping.Monitoring Agent: Tracks PnL, slippage, data quality; trips the kill switch.

reality_checks: Indicators, scores, position sizes and backtest metrics must be computed in deterministic code, not invented by the LLM.
1-minute strategies (S1-S4, S9 intraday) are noise- and cost-sensitive; slippage and spread can erase backtested edge.
Every strategy must pass walk-forward and out-of-sample tests, across multiple regimes, with realistic commissions and slippage, before any live capital.
Paper-trade first. Keep a hard kill switch and max-daily-loss limit wired to the Monitoring Agent.
This is an engineering specification, not investment advice.
